title: Bitcoin URI Scheme (BIP21)
description: BIP21 defines the `bitcoin:` URI scheme for packaging a payment destination with an amount and optional wallet-facing metadata such as a label or message. It standardizes payment links and QR payloads without changing the underlying transaction format.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Payment Processing
resources.notes: Canonical overview of payment requests, `bitcoin:` URIs, QR transport, and their role in wallet payment flows.

resources.title: BIP 21: URI Scheme
resources.notes: Canonical standard for `bitcoin:` URIs, amount encoding, and optional parameters.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for addresses, wallet payment flows, and the request formats layered on top of them.
